evaluations.completion_preview:
The topological entropy of the full one-sided shift on 2 symbols is given by the logarithm of the number of symbols, which in this case is 2. Therefore, the topological entropy is \(\log 2\).

The Hodge Conjecture for Calabi-Yau 3-folds asserts that certain cohomology classes are algebraic. Specifically:

(a) The conjecture asserts that Hodge classes on a Calabi-Yau 3-folds are algebraic.
